## Problem / motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? A clear and concise description of
what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
